title: Laptop controls — Ctrl+Shift+LMB for orbit
capture_instructions: Queens Campus point cloud visible from a mid-orbit angle (same as the orbit screenshot). The keyboard shortcut overlay must be prominent — show Ctrl, Shift, and LMB as pill badges at the top of the viewport or in a legend. The point cloud should appear as if the user is mid-orbit using the keyboard shortcut. The View Cube should show the tilted orientation.
ui_state: Grab/Navigate mode active, camera at mid-orbit angle achieved via Ctrl+Shift+LMB shortcut
